cluster_ids.name: Level Control
cluster_ids.summary: Controls a generic level (e.g. brightness) over time; derived clusters share the same instance if on same endpoint. Pseudocode: setLevel(target, rate)

classifications.summary: Base application-level cluster on an endpoint for generic level control; serves as parent for derived level-related clusters.

revisions.description: Introduce mandatory global ClusterRevision attribute for Level Control cluster.
Add Options attribute and state change table; align with ZLO 1.0; base cluster unchanged (CCB 2085 1775 2281 2147).
Add FeatureMap support with On/Off, Lighting and Frequency features for Level Control.
Adopt new data model format and notation for Level Control cluster definition.
Add Q quality to CurrentLevel, CurrentFrequency, RemainingTime; clarify Step behavior; adjust DefaultMoveRate constraint.

features.name: OnOff
features.summary: Provides tight dependency with On/Off cluster; enables command variants that link CurrentLevel and OnOff (e.g., level→min ⇒ OnOff=FALSE, level>min ⇒ OnOff=TRUE).
features.dependencies: On/Off cluster on same endpoint; behavior interacts with OnOff, OnLevel, OnOffTransitionTime, GlobalSceneControl, Options.ExecuteIfOff.

features.name: Lighting
features.summary: Lighting-oriented level semantics: CurrentLevel 0x01=min, 0xFE=max, 0x00 forbidden, null=undefined; other values are graded steps between min and max.
features.dependencies: Used in OptionsBitmap bits (ExecuteIfOff, CoupleColorTempToLevel) for lighting applications; may depend on Color Control cluster via options.

features.name: Frequency
features.summary: Provisional feature that adds frequency-related attributes and behavior for level control (e.g., mapping level changes to output frequency).

values.name: ExecuteIfOff
values.summary: If 1, this cluster has a dependency with the On/Off cluster

values.name: CoupleColorTempToLevel
values.summary: If 1, this cluster has a dependency with the Color Control cluster

attributes.name: CurrentLevel
attributes.summary: Indicates current device level (device-specific meaning). Reportable at most once/sec, at end of transition, or when changing between null and non-null.

attributes.name: RemainingTime
attributes.summary: Time in 1/10 s until current command completes. Report when: 0→>10, delta>10 due to command, or when it becomes 0. Not reported for transitions <1 s.

attributes.name: MinLevel
attributes.summary: Minimum value of CurrentLevel that can be assigned.

attributes.name: MaxLevel
attributes.summary: Maximum value of CurrentLevel that can be assigned.

attributes.name: CurrentFrequency
attributes.summary: Frequency at which device is at CurrentLevel (0=unknown). Report at most once/sec, or at start/end of movement/transition.

attributes.name: MinFrequency
attributes.summary: Minimum value of CurrentFrequency that can be assigned; 0 = undefined. MinFrequency ≤ MaxFrequency.

attributes.name: MaxFrequency
attributes.summary: Maximum value of CurrentFrequency that can be assigned; 0 = undefined. MaxFrequency ≥ MinFrequency.

attributes.name: OnOffTransitionTime
attributes.summary: Time in 1/10 s to move to/from target level when On/Off commands are received on same endpoint. Used if device supports variable rate.

attributes.name: OnLevel
attributes.summary: If non-null, when OnOff.On becomes TRUE due to On/Off command, set CurrentLevel = OnLevel; else no effect. New mandatory field; older devices may lack it.

attributes.name: OnTransitionTime
attributes.summary: Time in 1/10 s to move level from min to max on OnOff.On command. If not implemented or null, use OnOffTransitionTime instead.

attributes.name: OffTransitionTime
attributes.summary: Time in 1/10 s to move level from max to min on OnOff.Off command. If not implemented or null, use OnOffTransitionTime instead.

attributes.name: DefaultMoveRate
attributes.summary: Movement rate in units/sec used when Move command Rate parameter is null.

attributes.name: Options
attributes.summary: Bitmap controlling default command behavior (e.g., ExecuteIfOff, CoupleColorTempToLevel). Typically changed only during commissioning.

attributes.name: StartUpCurrentLevel
attributes.summary: On power-up (not OTA reboot): 0→set CurrentLevel to device min; null→restore previous; other→set CurrentLevel to this value.

commands.name: MoveToLevel
commands.summary: Move from current level to Level over TransitionTime, after processing temporary Options bitmap from OptionsMask/OptionsOverride.
commands.timing: TransitionTime in 0.1s units; if null use OnOffTransitionTime; if not present move as fast as able; may ignore timing if variable rate unsupported.

fields.name: Level
fields.summary: Target level for CurrentLevel; device-dependent meaning (e.g. brightness). Used as destination in level transition.

fields.name: TransitionTime
fields.summary: Time to move from current level to Level in tenths of a second; if null use OnOffTransitionTime or move as fast as able.

fields.name: OptionsMask
fields.summary: Mask bits: if bit=1, corresponding OptionsOverride bit replaces Options bit when forming temporary Options bitmap.

fields.name: OptionsOverride
fields.summary: Override bits: when OptionsMask bit=1, this bit is copied into temporary Options bitmap instead of Options bit.

commands.name: Move
commands.summary: Continuously move level up or down at Rate after processing temporary Options bitmap; stop at device min/max.
commands.timing: Rate in units/s; if null use DefaultMoveRate if supported and non-null; otherwise move as fast as able; MAY ignore if variable rate unsupported.

fields.name: MoveMode
fields.summary: Direction of movement; MUST be a non-reserved MoveModeEnum value (e.g. Up or Down).

fields.name: Rate
fields.summary: Requested movement rate in units per second; if null use DefaultMoveRate; else move as fast as possible; MAY be ignored if no variable rate.

fields.name: OptionsMask
fields.summary: Mask bits for forming temporary Options bitmap as in MoveToLevel.

fields.name: OptionsOverride
fields.summary: Override bits for forming temporary Options bitmap as in MoveToLevel.

commands.name: Step
commands.summary: Change level by StepSize up or down in TransitionTime after processing temporary Options bitmap; clamp to min/max and adjust time proportionally.
commands.timing: TransitionTime in 0.1s units; if null move as fast as able; MAY ignore if variable rate unsupported; proportionally reduce if clamped early.

fields.name: StepMode
fields.summary: Direction of level change; MUST be non-reserved StepModeEnum value (Up or Down).

fields.name: StepSize
fields.summary: Magnitude of change to CurrentLevel in units; 0 is invalid and causes INVALID_COMMAND.

fields.name: TransitionTime
fields.summary: Time for the step in tenths of a second; if null move as fast as able; MAY be ignored if variable rate unsupported.

fields.name: OptionsMask
fields.summary: Mask bits for forming temporary Options bitmap as in MoveToLevel.

fields.name: OptionsOverride
fields.summary: Override bits for forming temporary Options bitmap as in MoveToLevel.

commands.name: Stop
commands.summary: Stop any in-progress MoveToLevel, Move or Step (and 'with On/Off' variants) after processing temporary Options; freeze CurrentLevel and set RemainingTime to 0.

fields.name: OptionsMask
fields.summary: Mask bits for forming temporary Options bitmap as in MoveToLevel.

fields.name: OptionsOverride
fields.summary: Override bits for forming temporary Options bitmap as in MoveToLevel.

commands.name: MoveToLevelWithOnOff
commands.summary: Same as MoveToLevel, but also manipulates OnOff attribute based on resulting CurrentLevel relative to device min level.

fields.name: Level
fields.summary: Target level; identical semantics to MoveToLevel.Level.

fields.name: TransitionTime
fields.summary: Transition time; identical semantics to MoveToLevel.TransitionTime.

fields.name: OptionsMask
fields.summary: Same formation of temp Options as MoveToLevel.

fields.name: OptionsOverride
fields.summary: Same formation of temp Options as MoveToLevel.

commands.name: MoveWithOnOff
commands.summary: Same as Move, but also manipulates OnOff attribute when CurrentLevel crosses device min level.

fields.name: MoveMode
fields.summary: Same as Move.MoveMode.

fields.name: Rate
fields.summary: Same as Move.Rate.

fields.name: OptionsMask
fields.summary: Same as Move.OptionsMask.

fields.name: OptionsOverride
fields.summary: Same as Move.OptionsOverride.

commands.name: StepWithOnOff
commands.summary: Same as Step, but also manipulates OnOff attribute based on final CurrentLevel relative to device min level.

fields.name: StepMode
fields.summary: Same as Step.StepMode.

fields.name: StepSize
fields.summary: Same as Step.StepSize.

fields.name: TransitionTime
fields.summary: Same as Step.TransitionTime.

fields.name: OptionsMask
fields.summary: Same as Step.OptionsMask.

fields.name: OptionsOverride
fields.summary: Same as Step.OptionsOverride.

commands.name: StopWithOnOff
commands.summary: Identical to Stop; stops level transitions for both base and 'with On/Off' commands; On/Off dependency is from original command.

fields.name: OptionsMask
fields.summary: Identical semantics to Stop.OptionsMask.

fields.name: OptionsOverride
fields.summary: Identical semantics to Stop.OptionsOverride.

commands.name: MoveToClosestFrequency
commands.summary: Change current frequency to requested Frequency or closest supported; if cannot approximate, respond with CONSTRAINT_ERROR.

fields.name: Frequency
fields.summary: Requested frequency; device selects this or nearest generatable frequency; manufacturer decides what is approximable.

commands.effect_on_receipt:
target := Frequency
best := select_closest_supported_frequency(target)
if best == null:
  send_default_response(status=CONSTRAINT_ERROR)
  return
CurrentFrequency := best
// manufacturer-specific approximation logic inside select_closest_supported_frequency

State Change Table for Lighting.summary: If ExecuteIfOff=0 and device is off, MoveToLevel does not change level or on/off; output remains off.

result.output: Turns on and output level adjusts or stays at half

State Change Table for Lighting.summary: If ExecuteIfOff=0 and device is off, MoveToLevelWithOnOff turns device on and sets level to midpoint.
If ExecuteIfOff=1 and device is off, MoveToLevel updates CurrentLevel to midpoint but leaves device off.

result.output: Turns on and output level adjusts to or stays at half

State Change Table for Lighting.summary: If ExecuteIfOff=1 and device is off, MoveToLevelWithOnOff turns device on and sets level to midpoint.
If ExecuteIfOff=1 and device is off, Move up updates CurrentLevel to maximum but leaves device off.

result.output: Turn on and output level adjusts to or stays at full

State Change Table for Lighting.summary: If ExecuteIfOff=1 and device is off, MoveWithOnOff up turns device on and sets level to maximum.
If ExecuteIfOff=1 and device is off, MoveWithOnOff down sets CurrentLevel to minimum but device remains off.

result.output: Output level adjusts to or stays at half

State Change Table for Lighting.summary: When device is on, MoveToLevelWithOnOff sets level to midpoint and keeps device on.

result.output: Output level adjusts to or stays at full

State Change Table for Lighting.summary: When device is on, MoveWithOnOff up raises level to maximum and keeps device on.
When device is on, Move down lowers level to minimum but does not turn the device off.
When device is on, MoveWithOnOff down lowers level to minimum and turns the device off.

references.name: Derived Level Control Clusters
references.description: Other cluster specs derived from Level Control for specific domains; share same logical instance if co-present on an endpoint.

references.name: On/Off Cluster
references.description: Referenced via OnOff feature dependency; coordinates level with on/off state, e.g., if OnOff==off then level→0 (not defined here).

references.name: FeatureMap
references.description: Bitmap attribute listing supported features (OO, LT, FQ) for Level Control behavior selection (not defined here).

references.name: ClusterRevision
references.description: Global attribute indicating cluster version; value SHALL equal highest revision in this table (not defined here).

references.name: Options
references.description: Level Control cluster attribute controlling options/state behavior; semantics defined elsewhere.

references.name: State change table
references.description: Table describing Level Control state transitions based on commands; structure/logic defined elsewhere.

references.name: ZLO 1.0
references.description: Zigbee Light Link profile 1.0 reference used as basis for Level Control behavior; not specified here.

references.name: CurrentLevel
references.description: Attribute for current level value (e.g., brightness); here only Q quality added, full definition elsewhere.

references.name: CurrentFrequency
references.description: Attribute for current frequency; Q quality added in rev.6; attribute semantics defined elsewhere.

references.name: RemainingTime
references.description: Attribute indicating remaining transition time; Q quality added; full behavior defined elsewhere.

references.name: Step value
references.description: Parameter controlling incremental level changes; behavior clarified in rev.6, full rules elsewhere.

references.name: DefaultMoveRate
references.description: Attribute setting default rate of level change; constraint adjusted in rev.6; full constraints elsewhere.

references.name: On/Off cluster
references.description: Separate cluster providing on/off control; Level Control OnOff feature depends on it; full spec elsewhere.

references.name: Color Control Cluster
references.description: Cluster controlling color and color temperature; referenced via Options.CoupleColorTempToLevel to couple color temperature changes to level changes.

references.name: OnLevel Attribute (On/Off Cluster)
references.description: If implemented and not null, On/Off cmds have permanent effect on Level Control CurrentLevel per Effect of On/Off Commands when associated with Level Control table.

references.name: OnOffTransitionTime Attribute (On/Off Cluster)
references.description: Determines transition time for changing CurrentLevel in response to On/Off/Toggle when Level Control is linked; exact attribute definition is external.

references.name: GlobalSceneControl Attribute (On/Off Cluster)
references.description: Updated when Move/Step/MoveToLevel(WithOnOff) cause an OnOff change; exact semantics defined in the external GlobalSceneControl section.

references.name: Options Attribute (Level Control Cluster)
references.description: Controls whether Level Control cmds execute when OnOff=FALSE via ExecuteIfOff, and optional coupling to Color Control via CoupleColorTempToLevel; full details elsewhere.

references.name: Color Control cluster
references.description: Cluster on which CoupleColorTempToLevel bit indicates a dependency

references.name: uint8
references.description: Base integer type used by attributes such as CurrentLevel

references.name: uint16
references.description: Base integer type used by attributes such as RemainingTime

references.name: MinLevel
references.description: Constraint reference for CurrentLevel attribute: lower bound

references.name: MaxLevel
references.description: Constraint reference for CurrentLevel attribute: upper bound

references.name: Scenes Management server cluster
references.description: If present on same endpoint, Level Control attributes CurrentLevel and CurrentFrequency are stored in Scene Table ExtensionFieldSetStruct.

references.name: FeatureMap attribute
references.description: Determines which scene-stored Level Control attributes are supported; unsupported ones must exist in scene table but are ignored.

references.name: Options attribute
references.description: Bitmap attribute used with OptionsMask and OptionsOverride to form tempOptions; then process_Options(tempOptions) governs command behavior.

references.name: OnOffTransitionTime attribute
references.description: Optional attribute; if TransitionTime is null in MoveToLevel, duration := OnOffTransitionTime; if absent move as fast as able.

references.name: DefaultMoveRate attribute
references.description: Optional attribute; if Move.Rate is null and DefaultMoveRate is present and non-null, use it as movement rate; else move as fast as able.

references.name: CurrentLevel attribute
references.description: Represents device level; commands MoveToLevel, Move, Step and their 'with On/Off' variants update this over time.

references.name: RemainingTime attribute
references.description: Timer attribute for ongoing transitions; Stop commands set RemainingTime := 0 when terminating transitions.

references.name: MoveModeEnum
references.description: Enumeration for Move.MoveMode; non-reserved values include Up and Down to control continuous movement direction.

references.name: StepModeEnum
references.description: Enumeration for Step.StepMode; non-reserved values include Up and Down to control step direction.
